items.question: What is the Crunchy Mukbang ASMR workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow that generates crunchy mukbang-style ASMR clips with close-up bites and texture emphasis.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: ASMR creators, snack brands, social media managers, and food channels seeking sensory, crunchy content.

items.question: What inputs are needed?
items.answer: Describe the snacks and mood, your framing preference, and any style references you want to match.

items.question: What outputs can I expect?
items.answer: Short, platform-ready video clips with crisp textures and satisfying bites for social posting.

items.question: Can I control framing and pacing?
items.answer: Yes. Choose hands-only or implied persona and adjust pacing preferences to guide generation.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Generations consume credits by complexity and length. Iterate within your plan and export selected clips.
